data.title: Cryptocurrency markets struggle post-FOMC; Bitcoin down at $116,606, Ethereum $3,726, XRP $3.05, Dogecoin $0.2129. Bitcoin large transaction volume up 7.2%, addresses up 0.4%. 121,983 traders liquidated in 24 hours for $395.41 million. Robinhood crypto trading volume surges in July. Ethereum celebrates 10th birthday with strong July. Ethereum ETFs, Treasury companies hold over $32B in ETH. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: The cryptocurrency markets have experienced a downturn following Bitcoin's inability to maintain its position above the $119,000 threshold. Current prices for major cryptocurrencies stand at $116,606 for Bitcoin, $3,726 for Ethereum, $174.74 for Solana, $3.05 for XRP, $0.2129 for Dogecoin, and $0.00001265 for Shiba Inu. Key data from IntoTheBlock reveals a 7.2% increase in Bitcoin's large transaction volume and a 0.4% rise in daily active addresses, while exchange netflows decreased by 118.3%. Coinglass reports that 121,983 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, resulting in losses totaling $395.41 million. Among the top gainers in the past day are Pump.fun (PUMP), Sonic (S), and Toncoin (TON). Notable recent developments include a surge in Robinhood crypto trading volumes in July, insights from Bernstein suggesting it's still early in the bull cycle, Ethereum celebrating its 10th anniversary with a strong July performance that may signal further growth, Ethereum ETFs and treasury companies collectively holding over $32 billion in ETH, and information on Tether's activity. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Strategy has launched a $4.2 billion At-The-Market program to issue and sell shares of its Variable Rate Series A Perpetual Stretch Preferred Stock.
data.description: Tysons Corner-based company Strategy™ (Nasdaq: MSTR; STRK; STRF; STRD; STRC) has revealed a sales agreement enabling the issuance and sale of shares of its Variable Rate Series A Perpetual Stretch Preferred Stock, known as "STRC Stock." The aggregate offering price for the shares is up to $4.2 billion under the ATM Program. Strategy intends to conduct sales of the STRC Stock methodically over an extended period.

data.title: MasTec (NYSE: MTZ) surpasses Q2 2025 guidance with 20% revenue growth; CEO credits strong demand climate.
data.description: In Coral Gables, Florida, MasTec, Inc. revealed their second quarter 2025 financial results and revised full-year 2025 financial guidance. The company, listed as NYSE: MTZ, surpassed expectations in Q2 with revenue and earnings growth. CEO Jose Mas noted that the 20% revenue increase showcasing the company's success in capitalizing on high demand and effective execution. The robust performance signifies MasTec's ability to navigate the current market conditions.

data.title: WK Kellogg Co declared a dividend of $0.165/share, payable on Sept 12 for shareowners as of Aug.
data.description: In Battle Creek, Michigan, on July 31, 2025, WK Kellogg Co (NYSE: KLG) revealed that a dividend of $0.165 per share has been declared by its Board of Directors for the common stock of WK Kellogg Co. This dividend is set to be paid on September 12, 2025, to shareholders of record as of the end of business on August [specific date not mentioned in the snippet].

data.title: CHAMPgov chosen by Louisiana to digitally transform OMV, enhancing services for millions in the state.
data.description: A tech company called CHAMP has been chosen by Louisiana to upgrade the state's OMV system. This initiative aims to enhance government services for millions of residents across the state.

data.title: Trisura Group Ltd. to release Q2 2025 results and host earnings call. Details announced. TSX: TSU.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, Trisura Group Ltd. (TSX: TSU), a prominent specialty insurance company, revealed details regarding the release of its financial results for the second quarter of 2025. Trisura Group announced the schedule for the earnings conference call alongside this release.

data.title: John Hancock Tax-Advantaged Dividend Income Fund reports sources of distribution for July 2025.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, in Boston, John Hancock Tax-Advantaged Dividend Income Fund (NYSE: HTD), a closed-end fund managed by John Hancock Investment Management LLC and subadvised by Manulife Investment Management (US) LLC, disclosed the origins of its monthly earnings.

data.title: John Hancock Premium Dividend Fund (NYSE: PDT) announces sources of monthly distribution of $0.0825 on July 31, 2025.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, located in Boston, the John Hancock Premium Dividend Fund (NYSE: PDT) revealed details of its monthly distribution amounting to $0.0825. The Fund, a closed-end fund that is managed by John Hancock Investment Management LLC and subadvised by Manulife Investment Management (US) LLC, made this announcement.

data.title: Mirion reports Q2 2025 financial results, shows progress towards 2025 targets. Positively positioned for market growth.
data.description: In Atlanta, Mirion (NYSE: MIR), a leading global provider of radiation detection solutions for various industries, reported their second-quarter results for the period ending June 30, 2025. The company's Chairman and CEO expressed satisfaction with the results, noting they are on track to meet their financial goals for 2025. Mirion serves the nuclear, medical, defense, and research sectors and is capitalizing on strong market conditions.
Company profits $10B in Q2 after rise in Bitcoin value, per strategy reports.
Trump: We just made a couple of other trade deals little while ago.

data.title: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. discloses Q2 2025 results: $3.18B total revenues, $366.2M net earnings, and $1.40 EPS. CEO optimistic for future growth.
data.description: Insurance company Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE: AJG) reported strong financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2025. The company's total revenues amounted to $3,177.9 million, an increase from the previous year, with net earnings of $366.2 million. Adjusted figures showed total revenues of $3,171.7 million and net earnings of $609.1 million. The Brokerage segment reported revenues of $2,785.6 million, up from $2,376.3 million in the previous year. The Risk Management segment reported revenues of $391.9 million, compared to $358.6 million in the same period last year. The Corporate segment reported revenues of $0.4 million, down from $1.1 million. The company's CEO highlighted 16% revenue growth and a net earnings margin increase of 343 basis points. Gallagher completed 9 mergers in the quarter and is progressing with the pending AssuredPartners acquisition. The global P/C insurance market remains rational, with property declining by 7% and casualty increasing by 8%. The company remains optimistic about its position for the remainder of the year.

data.title: PHINIA declares $0.27 dividend/share, payable Sept 12, 2025 to shareholders of record by Aug 22, 2025.
data.description: AUBURN HILLS, Mich.-- Premium fuel systems and aftermarket solutions leader, PHINIA Inc. (“PHINIA” or the “Company”) (NYSE: PHIN), has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.27 per common share. The dividend will be payable on September 12, 2025, to shareholders of record as of August 22, 2025. PHINIA is renowned for its premium solutions and components in the industry.

data.title: Kinetik's 2024 Sustainability Report showcases progress towards safer, lower-carbon energy future. #Sustainability #KNTK
data.description: Kinetik Holdings Inc. (NYSE: KNTK) released its 2024 Sustainability Report, showcasing its sustainability efforts and accomplishments during the year. The report outlines the company's journey towards a safer, more eco-friendly, and dependable energy future, emphasizing its dedication to sustainability across all operations. This transparent review highlights Kinetik's advancements and commitment to reducing carbon emissions. The electronic version of the report is now available to the public.

data.title: Pacific Coast Oil Trust reports no cash distribution for July 2025 based on May 2025 profits.
data.description: Pacific Coast Oil Trust (OTC–ROYTL), a royalty trust established by Pacific Coast Energy Company LP, disclosed that no cash distribution will be made to unit holders of record on July 30, 2025. This decision was influenced by the Trust's evaluation of net profits earned in May 2025. The Conveyance terms dictate the allocation of net profits interests and overriding royalty interest, resulting in the lack of cash distribution for the Current Month.

data.title: Rogers Corp's Q2 2025 results show increased sales sequentially, with $28 million shares repurchased. CEO pleased with performance.
data.description: Rogers Corporation (NYSE:ROG) based in Chandler, Arizona, shared their financial results for Q2 of 2025. Ali El-Haj, the Interim President and CEO, noted that sales in the second quarter showed a sequential increase thanks to overall improvements in most end markets. The company's sales, gross margin, and adjusted earnings per share for the quarter all fell within the expected ranges. In addition, Rogers used its robust balance sheet to repurchase $28 million worth of shares during Q2.
